_comment: Lina offline brain dataset. Add or edit entries here — no PHP changes needed.

about.intro: I'm **Lina**, your personal AI assistant built into this Task Manager app by **{name}**. 🌟
about.description: I'm designed to keep you organised and productive. I have full access to your:
about.offline_note: > 💡 I'm currently running in **Offline Mode** — my cloud AI brain is temporarily resting. I can still fully navigate your workspace data!

help.intro: Here's what I can help you with right now:
help.offline_note: > 💡 **Offline Mode**: General knowledge, coding help, and web search will return when my cloud brain reconnects!

thanks: You're welcome! 😊 Anything else I can help with?
Happy to help! Let me know if you need anything.
Anytime! I'm here whenever you need me. 🌟
Of course! Feel free to ask about your tasks, projects, or reminders.
My pleasure! Is there anything else on your mind?
Glad I could help! Don't hesitate to ask.

unknown.intro: I'm **Lina** running in **Offline Mode** 🔌 — so I can only access your workspace data right now (no general knowledge or coding help until my cloud brain reconnects).
unknown.prompt: Here are some things you can ask me:
unknown.footer: > 💡 Full AI capabilities will return shortly. Try asking about your tasks, projects, notes, or reminders!

empty_states.tasks_today:
🎉 **No tasks due today!** You're all clear.

Would you like to see all pending tasks instead?
empty_states.tasks_tomorrow: 📅 **No tasks due tomorrow.** Enjoy the buffer!
empty_states.overdue: ✅ **No overdue tasks!** You're doing great with deadlines. 🏆
empty_states.high_priority: ✅ **No high priority pending tasks.** Everything looks calm!
empty_states.completed: No completed tasks yet. Keep going — you'll get there!
empty_states.all_tasks: 🎉 **No pending tasks!** Your slate is clean. Add something new or enjoy the break.
empty_states.projects: You have no projects yet. Head to the Projects section to create one!
empty_states.notes: You have no notes yet. Start capturing your ideas in the Notes section!
empty_states.routines: You have no routines set up yet. Head to Routines to build healthy habits!
empty_states.files: You have no files uploaded yet.

labels.overdue_footer: > Consider updating their due dates or marking them complete.
labels.summary_footer_clear: > ✅ You're all caught up! Great work.
